buildCommand: set -ex && pnpm --filter @workspace/pairing-site run build && echo "--- Vite done, checking output ---" && ls -la artifacts/pairing-site/dist/public || (echo "ERROR: artifacts/pairing-site/dist/public not found" && exit 1) && mkdir -p public && cp -r artifacts/pairing-site/dist/public/. public/ && echo "--- Copy done ---" && ls -la public/
